name: Saha Pathana Inter-Holding Public Company Limited
summary: Saha Pathana Inter-Holding Public Company Limited engages in the investment and real estate businesses in Thailand. The company operates through three segments: Investment in Consumer Products Business; Investment in Food and Beverage Business; and Industrial Park Development and Investment in Other Businesses. It invests in, develops, and rents a hotel and a golf course; and leases land and buildings. The company also invests in consumer products, such as textile and fashion, household, beauty and cosmetics, and other consumer products; and food and beverages, which include instant noodles and semi-finished foods, and bread and bakery products. In addition, it is involved in the development and operation of four industrial parks in Si Racha District, Chonburi Province; Kabinburi District, Prachinburi Province; Mueang Lamphun District, Lamphun Province; and Mae Sot District, Tak Province. Further, the company provides consultation on business planning and project execution, as well as trademark services. The company was formerly known as Saha Pathana Investment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Saha Pathana Inter-Holding Public Company Limited in 1984. Saha Pathana Inter-Holding Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
